build.beforeDevCommand: cd ../../apps/leptos && env -u NO_COLOR RUSTC_WRAPPER= SCCACHE_DISABLE=1 ~/.cargo/bin/trunk serve --address 127.0.0.1 --port 1420
build.beforeBuildCommand: cd ../../apps/leptos && env -u NO_COLOR RUSTC_WRAPPER= SCCACHE_DISABLE=1 ~/.cargo/bin/trunk build --release

security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; connect-src 'self' ws://localhost:8888 wss://mail-conductor.luminousdynamics.io http://localhost:8117 https://mail.mycelix.net; img-src 'self' data: blob: https:; worker-src 'self' blob:

bundle.longDescription: Tauri v2 desktop wrapper for Mycelix Pulse — decentralized encrypted communication on Holochain.
